creator: jarrod@downtools.com.au
text:
Due to a domain name change, the existing maintainer email address and master
site for this port now refer to a non-existent domain.  This PR corrects both of
these and allows the port to be built when source is required.

Though physically, I am the current maintainer of this port, as the existing
email address will likely bounce, I have raised this PR as a change-request.
Please see previous commit history for net-mgmt/nagios or net-mgmt/nagios-plugins
to confirm similar changes in email address.

Fix: Downloadable plain text diff:
http://www.downtools.com.au/~jarrod/FreeBSD/dns-dnscheck-master_sites.diff
